en: But now thus says the LORD, he who created you, O Jacob, he who formed you, O Israel: "Fear not, for I have redeemed you; I have called you by name, you are mine.
zh: 但是，雅各啊！那創造你的耶和華， 以色列啊！那塑造你的主，現在這樣說： “不要懼怕，因為我救贖了你； 我按著你的名呼召了你；你是屬我的。

en: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you; and through the rivers, they shall not overwhelm you; when you walk through fire you shall not be burned, and the flame shall not consume you.
zh: 你從水中經過的時候，我必與你同在； 你渡過江河的時候，水必不淹沒你； 你從火中行走的時候，必不會燒傷； 火燄也不會在你身上燒起來。

en: For I am the LORD your God, the Holy One of Israel, your Savior. I give Egypt as your ransom, Cush and Seba in exchange for you.
zh: 因為我是耶和華你的 神， 是以色列的聖者，你的拯救者； 我使埃及作你的贖價， 使古實和示巴作你的替身。

en: Because you are precious in my eyes, and honored, and I love you, I give men in return for you, peoples in exchange for your life.
zh: 因為你在我眼中非常寶貴和貴重， 所以我愛你； 我使別人作你的替身，同別的民族交換你的性命。

en: Fear not, for I am with you; I will bring your offspring from the east, and from the west I will gather you.
zh: 你不要懼怕，因為我與你同在； 我必把你的後裔從東方領回來， 又從西方招聚你。

en: I will say to the north, Give up, and to the south, Do not withhold; bring my sons from afar and my daughters from the end of the earth,
zh: 我要對北方說：‘把他們交出來！’ 又對南方說：‘不要拘留他們！’ 要把我的眾子從遠方帶回來， 把我的女兒從地極領回來，

en: everyone who is called by my name, whom I created for my glory, whom I formed and made."
zh: 就是所有按著我的名被召的人， 是我為自己的榮耀創造的， 是我所塑造，所作成的。”

en: Bring out the people who are blind, yet have eyes, who are deaf, yet have ears!
zh: 你要把那些有眼卻看不見， 有耳卻聽不到的人民領出來。

en: All the nations gather together, and the peoples assemble. Who among them can declare this, and show us the former things? Let them bring their witnesses to prove them right, and let them hear and say, It is true.
zh: 列國都聚集在一起， 萬族都集合起來， 他們中間誰能說明這事呢？ 誰能把先前的事說給我們聽呢？ 讓他們帶出自己的見證人來，好顯明自己為義； 讓別人聽見了，就說：“這是真的。”

en: "You are my witnesses," declares the LORD, "and my servant whom I have chosen, that you may know and believe me and understand that I am he. Before me no god was formed, nor shall there be any after me.
zh: 耶和華說：“你們就是我的見證人， 我所揀選的僕人， 為要使你們知道，並且相信我， 又明白我就是‘那位’； 在我以前沒有神被造出來， 在我以後也必沒有。

en: I, I am the LORD, and besides me there is no savior.
zh: 唯有我是耶和華； 除我以外，並沒有拯救者。

en: I declared and saved and proclaimed, when there was no strange god among you; and you are my witnesses," declares the LORD, "and I am God.
zh: 我曾預告，我曾拯救，我曾說給你們聽， 在你們中間沒有別的神。” 耶和華說：“你們是我的見證人， 我就是 神。

en: Also henceforth I am he; there is none who can deliver from my hand; I work, and who can turn it back?"
zh: 自頭一天以來，我就是‘那位’； 誰也不能救人脫離我的手； 我要行事，誰能攔阻呢？”

en: Thus says the LORD, your Redeemer, the Holy One of Israel: "For your sake I send to Babylon and bring them all down as fugitives, even the Chaldeans, in the ships in which they rejoice.
zh: 你們的救贖主、以色列的聖者、耶和華這樣說： “因為你們的緣故，我已經派人到巴比倫去， 我要使所有的迦勒底人都像難民一樣下來， 都坐在他們素來自誇的船下來。

en: I am the LORD, your Holy One, the Creator of Israel, your King."
zh: 我就是耶和華，你們的聖者， 是以色列的創造主、你們的王。”

en: Thus says the LORD, who makes a way in the sea, a path in the mighty waters,
zh: 耶和華這樣說： 他在海中開了一條道， 在大水中闢了一條路；

en: who brings forth chariot and horse, army and warrior; they lie down, they cannot rise, they are extinguished, quenched like a wick:
zh: 他使戰車、馬匹、 軍兵和勇士都一同出來， 他們都躺下去，不能再起來； 他們都滅沒，好像燈火熄滅一樣。

en: "Remember not the former things, nor consider the things of old.
zh: “你們不要懷念先前的事， 也不要思念古時的事。

en: Behold, I am doing a new thing; now it springs forth, do you not perceive it? I will make a way in the wilderness and rivers in the desert.
zh: “看哪！我要作一件新的事； 現在它要發生了， 難道你們還不知道嗎？ 我要在曠野開一條道路， 在荒地開挖江河。

en: The wild beasts will honor me, the jackals and the ostriches, for I give water in the wilderness, rivers in the desert, to give drink to my chosen people,
zh: 野地的走獸必尊重我， 野狗和鴕鳥也必這樣， 因為我使曠野有水， 使荒地有江河， 好使我揀選的子民有水喝，

en: the people whom I formed for myself that they might declare my praise.
zh: 就是我為自己所造的子民， 好使他們述說讚美我的話。

en: "Yet you did not call upon me, O Jacob; but you have been weary of me, O Israel!
zh: 然而，雅各啊！你並沒有呼求我。 以色列啊！你竟厭煩我。

en: You have not brought me your sheep for burnt offerings, or honored me with your sacrifices. I have not burdened you with offerings, or wearied you with frankincense.
zh: 作燔祭用的羊，你沒有帶來給我； 也沒有用你的祭物來尊敬我； 我沒有因獻供物使你勞累； 也沒有因獻乳香使你厭煩。

en: You have not bought me sweet cane with money, or satisfied me with the fat of your sacrifices. But you have burdened me with your sins; you have wearied me with your iniquities.
zh: 你沒有用銀子為我買菖蒲， 也沒有用祭物的脂肪使我飽足； 相反地，你用你的罪使我勞累， 你用你的罪孽使我厭煩。

en: "I, I am he who blots out your transgressions for my own sake, and I will not remember your sins.
zh: “唯有我為自己的緣故，塗抹你的過犯， 我也不再記念你的罪。

en: Put me in remembrance; let us argue together; set forth your case, that you may be proved right.
zh: 你可以提醒我，我們可以一起辯論； 你儘管細說案情，好使你自顯為義。

en: Your first father sinned, and your mediators transgressed against me.
zh: 你的祖先犯了罪， 你的代表背叛了我。

en: Therefore I will profane the princes of the sanctuary, and deliver Jacob to utter destruction and Israel to reviling.
zh: 所以我要辱沒聖所裡的領袖， 使雅各遭受毀滅，使以色列被凌辱。”
